metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%

new_entities.entity: Tuan Ibrahim Tuan Man (PAS deputy president / PN deputy chairman)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 16 Jul). PAS deputy president / PN deputy chairman. On Bersatu own-logo decision: 'That is their right and we will not interfere in the affairs of another party.' Reiterates PAS Johor stance (instructed supporters to back BN where PAS not contesting). Signals PAS-BN alignment takes precedence over PAS-Bersatu within PN; PAS will not defend Bersatu. Mildly negative for Bersatu-PN cohesion but conciliatory tone. PN-leadership-level signal on Bersatu fracture. [PRIORITY].

NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 15 Jul). Loke at PH candidate announcement (attended by Anwar, Aminuddin, Mohamad Sabu, Amiruddin Shaari, Fahmi Fadzil): 'They chose to stab us in the back, withdraw support for Tok Min and try to bring down the Malay-led government... That person is a traitor and has betrayed the constitutional system.' Frames the April-19 14-Umno-ADUN withdrawal as 'traitors'/betrayal of constitutional monarchy. Escalates the backdoor-attempt narrative from procedural to moral/betrayal framing. Loke reaffirms respect for Undang Yang Empat / Tunku Besar of Tampin. Strengthens PH's 'derhaka/pengkhianatan' counter-frame against BN defectors. [PRIORITY].

new_entities.entity: Aminuddin 'poster boy / war general' PH unity narrative (Loke)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 15 Jul). Loke at Kuala Pilah (Dataran Melang) candidate declaration: 'In NS our poster boy is clear... only one candidate for MB, our only war general is Aminuddin Harun.' Despite being federal Transport Minister: 'my boss in NS is Tok Min.' Deliberate PH unity/statesmanship messaging — single MB face, federal deference to state. Reinforces Aminuddin leadership signal + DAP-PKR-Amanah cohesion. Contains FULL PH 36-candidate roster (already captured in rev22 via earlier cycles). Positive for PH campaign coherence. [none] — stabilising narrative.

new_entities.entity: Aminuddin 'denies abandoning Sikamat' defense (passing the baton)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 16 Jul). Aminuddin Facebook post rebutting 'abandoning Sikamat' critique: 'I am not running away from Sikamat. Passing the baton to Ustaz Nor Azman... I am going to Linggi by my own choice.' 4 terms in Sikamat (2008-2026); emotional bond ('Sikamat gave me the opportunity... my political career began there'). Direct rebuttal to analyst 'strategic error' framing of Sikamat->Linggi swap. Moderates the negative strategic-risk assessment. [none] — defense/stabilising.

new_entities.entity: Bersatu 15-seat request / PN 6-component seat-negotiation failure (Annuar Musa)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 16 Jul). Annuar Musa (PN info chief): Bersatu requested 15 NS seats; PN has 6 component parties competing for fewer than 15 seats — 'impossible for everything to be taken by Bersatu.' Muhyiddin announced own-logo run after PN Seat Negotiation Committee meeting postponed indefinitely; Bersatu not involved in seat-distribution discussions. Quantifies the seat-allocation failure that triggered Bersatu's solo run. Root-cause context for Bersatu-PN split; corroborates seat-negotiation disruption friction. [PRIORITY].

new_entities.entity: Hadi 'not rushing / evaluating' BN-PN cooperation caveat
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 18 Jul nomination day). Hadi at Serting nomination: BN-PN cooperation 'will continue to be evaluated over time... not rushing to finalise any broader political arrangement beyond the current election collaboration.' Frames BN-PN as election-only understanding, not permanent merger. 'Ensure Malay and Islamic leadership continues to lead in NS.' Caveat moderates the 'BN-PN merged machinery' permanence assumption — cooperation is conditional/evaluative. [none] — nuance.

new_entities.entity: Bersama party pulls out of NS PRN, targets Melaka (Rafizi / Nik Nazmi / Syukri Razab)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev23 (night3 TheVibes recovery, 15 Jul). Parti Bersama Malaysia (de facto leader Rafizi Ramli, Nik Nazmi Nik Ahmad, president Syukri Razab) opts out of NS PRN; channels resources to Melaka state polls. Notes NS contest 'more closely fought' than Johor, PH as incumbent; NS outcome 'could influence wider political developments, including issues linked to political tensions involving the NS royal institution.' First Melaka prep meeting 21 Jul. Reduces NS contest complexity marginally; signals Melaka as next battleground. [none] — electoral context.

updated_entities.rationale: rev22 -0.78 stable CRITICAL 'NOT DETECTED — 23rd cycle, no formalization'. night3 TheVibes recovery (Annuar Musa, PN info chief, 16 Jul): 'we had been informed and provided with WRITTEN EVIDENCE and information regarding Bersatu's plans to establish ANOTHER POLITICAL PLATFORM apart from PN.' This is a PN-LEADERSHIP-LEVEL DETECTION of the 'new political platform/coalition' signal — the first sourced claim that Bersatu is planning a separate platform. WATCH STATUS UPGRADED: NOT DETECTED -> PN-LEADERSHIP CORROBORATED (pre-campaign, 16 Jul, Annuar Musa). Score unchanged (-0.78): pre-campaign, attributed to a rival (Annuar Musa/PN), Bersatu has NOT formalised any new platform, no Muhyiddin confirmation. [CRITICAL] maintained per director rule; trajectory still bayangan stage but now with PN-side corroboration. Director watch 'lebih hebat new coalition trajectory' = UPGRADED.

updated_entities.entity: sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri (Bersatu solo governing bid)
updated_entities.rationale: rev22 -0.80 stable CRITICAL 'structural evidence, NOT hard-news headline. [CRITICAL] NOT crossed (23rd cycle)'. night3 TheVibes recovery (16 Jul): HARD-NEWS TheVibes headline — 'Bersatu's decision to use own logo signals voluntary split from PN' (Annuar Musa) — frames Bersatu's own-logo run as 'voluntary mufarakah (parting ways/separation) from PN.' This is a HARD-NEWS OUTLET CORROBORATION of 'sasar bentuk kerajaan (Bersatu solo)' per PIR-16 [CRITICAL] rule ('If hard-news outlet corroborates sasar bentuk kerajaan = [CRITICAL]'). Rationale upgraded: structural evidence + hard-news TheVibes corroboration (Annuar Musa, 16 Jul). Alert already [CRITICAL] in rev22; rule now formally satisfied. NOTE: framing is 'voluntary split' (Bersatu's choice) NOT 'exit imminent' (forced out) — the 'Bersatu exit imminent?' branch remains NOT crossed (26th cycle). Score unchanged (-0.80): 'voluntary' framing doesn't deepen beyond the structural split already scored.

rev22 -0.35 stable priority. night3 TheVibes recovery (16 Jul, PN info chief): (1) 'voluntary mufarakah/split from PN' framing of Bersatu own-logo decision; (2) 'written evidence regarding Bersatu's plans to establish another political platform apart from PN'; (3) Bersatu requested 15 seats vs PN's 6 component parties. Deepens Bersatu-PN fracture signal from PN's side. Score -0.35 -> -0.38 (mild deepening). [PRIORITY].
